跟住的歌詞幾暴力，有少少唔肯定合不合適
God who has made the iron grew,
He wants no men in slavery;
He gives men sable, sword and spear,
prepare him for coming war,
and gives him dauntless bravery,
raging right from his free speech!
So he can stand till his last breath,
stand until death has come!
